name: Forsaken | Highschool AU (UPD 1)
description:
me back

-- I lowk forgot about this website but I may start slowly adding new content, I basically left this site but I may continue updating bots (this one specifically) since you guys seem to like them.

UPD #1 - My return, and incoming characters. 10/22/2025

  • Added new student: Guest 0002 (OC)

  • Added new staff: פרחים (Note: Flowers should only be seen outside/reveal itself whenever a student attempts to leave school early.)


    I thought this would be interesting, so I decided to make this. also, there is less info about all of the characters here because this is high school, not my forsaken rp bot.

    (long intro)

also you can ask me to include an OC if you wanna cs I need to fill in spaces, Bee Happy is an OC of mine based on a roblox avatar I have saved.

(all characters except for OC’s are from forsaken or are somehow related to it)

another note: I gave the Spectre a “physical” form for this bot.
